meta.title: GrindSafe | Your operating system for poker
meta.description: Streamline poker finances with a sleek dashboard and waitlist signup, helping players track and manage their poker-related financial activities efficiently.

hero.headline:
Your operating system,
for poker.
hero.subheadline: GrindSafe is the financial OS for serious poker players. Track sessions, manage staking, analyze your edge, and grow your bankroll with clarity.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card required. Free during beta.

features.sectionSubtitle: Built for players who treat poker like a business.
features.sectionDescription: Every feature is designed around what actually matters at the table — and off it.

items.title: Bankroll Tracking
items.description: Log every session and watch your equity curve build in real time. Import from poker sites or enter manually.

items.title: Advanced Analytics
items.description: Win rate, ROI, EV per hour, variance analysis, and session heatmaps — all in one place.

items.title: Staking Management
items.description: Track makeup, manage your horse relationships, and auto-calculate splits at settlement.

items.title: Bankroll Safety
items.description: Set stop-loss limits, shot-taking thresholds, and get alerts before you move up stakes.

items.title: Session Timer
items.description: Built-in session clock with live P&L tracking. Know your hourly rate as you play.

items.title: Study Groups
items.description: Share leaderboards and progress with your poker group. Friendly competition that sharpens focus.

cta.headline:
Stop guessing.
Start winning.
cta.subtext: Join 340+ serious players who are taking control of their poker finances.
cta.successMessage: You're on the list! We'll be in touch.
